title: Legal Context Protocol Discovery Document
description: Schema for /.well-known/legal-context.json — the discovery document defined by the Legal Context Protocol (LCP) v0.1.1.

terms.description: Absolute HTTPS URL of the legal terms document. MUST return a standalone, downloadable file.

termsFormat.description: The format or schema of the terms document. Signals to agents whether the terms are machine-readable before fetching.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the terms document, 0x-prefixed lowercase hex (66 characters).

hashAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm used. Defaults to 'sha256' if contentHash is present.

acceptanceRequired.description: If true, counterparties MUST explicitly accept terms before transacting.

method.description: The dispute resolution method (e.g., 'AAA Commercial Arbitration Rules').

contact.description: Contact for dispute filing (email or URL).

clauseId.description: Content-addressed identifier of the dispute resolution clause. Format: sha256:0x<hex>.

source.description: URL where the dispute resolution clause text can be retrieved.

catalog.description: URL of the dispute resolution provider's service catalog for programmatic clause generation.

returns.description: URL of a returns or claims API/process.

api.description: URL of a legal context API providing richer functionality (record management, verification, dispute filing).
